headline: ChargePoint to Participate in J.P. Morgan Natural Resources Conference
summary: CAMPBELL, Calif., June 17, 2026--ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:CHPT) ("ChargePoint"), a global leader in electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions, today announced that members of its executive team will participate in a fireside chat at the upcoming J.P. Morgan Natural Resources Conference, taking place Tuesday, June 23, 2026 at 2:25 pm ET.

headline: Big Bank Stocks Hit Records Ahead of Fed Meeting
summary: Shares of large U.S. banks outperformed the market on Wednesday, with some hitting records, as investors awaited the first Federal Open Market Committee meeting of Kevin Warsh’s Fed chairmanship.  Investment banks Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley also rallied and hit records, according to FactSet and Dow Jones Market Data.  Traders widely expect the Fed will keep the benchmark federal-funds rate target unchanged at a range of 3.50% to 3.75%.

Traders widely expect the Fed will keep the benchmark federal-funds rate target unchanged at a range of 3.50% to 3.75%.

headline: Umicore - Transparency notifications by JP Morgan Chase & Co.
summary: Transparency notifications byJP Morgan Chase & Co. In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by JP Morgan Chase & Co. that it has crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments downwards on 8 June 2026 and that it has crossed the threshold of 3% for equivalent financial instruments upwards on 9 June 2026. headline: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Expands Chase Digital Bank Across Europe In Five Year Push
summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) is extending its Chase digital bank into multiple new European markets. The company plans to target at least five European countries within five years, including large markets such as France, Spain, and Italy. The expansion is aimed at building Chase into a prominent digital banking brand beyond its U.S. core customer base. For you as an investor, this expansion highlights how JPMorgan Chase is using its existing digital banking platform to reach more retail...

The stock last closed at US$331.14, with returns of 5.9% over 7 days, 11.2% over 30 days, 1.7% year to date and 25.3% over 1 year, which has put valuation front of mind for many investors.
